# audited-against: git-scm.com/docs 2026-07-02
pre-commit	git commit -m "x"
pre-commit	git commit -am "x"
pre-commit	git commit -F msg.txt
pre-commit	git commit --amend --no-edit
pre-commit	git -C /other/repo commit -m "x"
pre-commit	git -c user.name=x commit -m "y"
pre-commit	GIT_DIR=.git git commit -m "x"
pre-commit	env FOO=bar git commit -m "x"
pre-commit	make lint && git commit -m "x"
pre-push	git push
pre-push	git push --force-with-lease
pre-push	git push origin HEAD
pre-push	git -C /other/repo push
none	git status
none	git log --oneline
none	git diff HEAD
none	git show HEAD
none	git config commit.gpgsign false
none	git commit --dry-run
none	git stash
none	git cherry-pick abc123
none	git revert HEAD
none	git merge feature
none	cd sub && git commit -m "x"
none	ls -la
none	echo git commit
